prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to an environmental permit issued by the Environment Agency which regulates activities in England and Wales. Since it specifically references the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016 and the facility is located in Cheltenham, England, it is applicable to England.
